title: Surgeon Vacancy at Fortis Healthcare Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Fortis Healthcare Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Fortis Healthcare Global Group are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Fortis Healthcare Global Group:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
